docket_entries.description: DECLARATORY RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAIN DC, LAURENCE NIELSEN DC, DONALD TATSUNO DC, WALTER WATTENBERG DC, STEPHANIE PRESCOTT DC, LORI AS TO DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF CHIROPRACTIC EXAMINERS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-19-2002

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR AN EXTENSION OF TIME 1-TO SERVE THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT AND 2- TO REQUEST REASSIGNMENT TO A DIFFERENTE CASE MANGEMENT PLAN, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAIN DC, LAURENCE NIELSEN DC, DONALD TATSUNO DC, WALTER WATTENBERG DC, STEPHANIE PRESCOTT DC, LORI
ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO SERVE THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT TO 11-29-02
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-03-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
